title: No Kings protests: millions rally in cities around the world against Trump and his administration – as it happened
summary_full: This liveblog is now closed. Read the full story here.No Kings protests to see millions across US push back on Trump administrationWhat to know about the third No Kings protests happening in MarchIn the year since Donald Trump retook office, the number of protests in the US outpaced those at the same point in his first administration, according to data from the Crowd Counting Consortium, an open-source project collaboration between Harvard University’s Kennedy School and the University of Connecticut, reported Lex McMenamin and Andrew Witherspoon.There were more than 10,700 protests in 2025, a 133% increase from the 4,588 recorded in 2017, the first year of Trump’s first term. According to the data, an overwhelming majority of US counties – including 42% that voted for Trump – have had at least one protest since he was re-inaugurated last year. Continue reading...
